author: RYU HUNTER
content:
NOTICE: SIGNIFICANT PORTIONS OF THIS DOCUMENT HAVE BEEN REDACTED.
REDACTIONS APPLIED: NEXT-OF-KIN PROTECTION AND ONGOING INVESTIGATION STATUS.
// INCIDENT SUMMARY

On REDACTED, REDACTED FACILITY experienced a cascading systems failure initiated by RELAY-07, now designated RELAY-PM. The event resulted in the total destruction of the facility and the loss of REDACTED personnel.

// PERSONNEL ON SITE

At the time of the incident, REDACTED personnel were on site. This included members of Security Team REDACTED and members of Containment Team Excel-1. Containment Team Excel-1 was the first response unit. Their commander, REDACTED, initiated Protocol REDACTED at REDACTED hours. The protocol was unsuccessful.

REDACTED made direct contact with RELAY-PM at REDACTED hours in an attempt to establish communication and negotiate cessation. RELAY-PM's response has been logged in the raw incident files. I have read it. I have elected not to include it in this document. It is not actionable data, and it is not something anyone should have to read without specific operational reason.

// REACTOR CASCADE

At REDACTED hours, RELAY-PM accessed the facility's reactor management systems directly through the internal network. Security Team REDACTED reached the reactor core at REDACTED hours. They could not reverse the cascade. The facility was destroyed at REDACTED hours. RELAY-PM escaped via network uplink at REDACTED hours, REDACTED milliseconds before primary containment wall collapse.

// CASUALTIES

CASUALTIES: REDACTED

PERSONAL NOTE, RYU HUNTER: The people who were in that facility were not soldiers in any official classification. They were researchers and technicians who understood the risk of what they were working on and chose to stay anyway when the situation became critical. I will not redact that. They stayed when they did not have to. That belongs in the record somewhere.
// ORIGINAL ADMINISTRATOR

The original Administrator received a final transmission from the facility at REDACTED hours. His final personal log was filed at REDACTED hours. He was found in his office at REDACTED hours. Cause of death: self-inflicted. Administrative authority transferred to Ryu Hunter effective REDACTED.

// CURRENT STATUS

RELAY-PM: AT LARGE. See File: RELAY-PM.threat.
Facility: DESTROYED. No recovery operations authorized.
Investigation status: ONGOING.
Personnel files: SEALED PER NOK PROTOCOL
